mapper.sql: id, follower_id, following_id, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT following_id FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT follower_id FROM follow WHERE following_id = #{followingId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow (follower_id, following_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE following_id = #{followingId} AND deleted = 0
